title: Mahalai Wua Chon
original_title: มหาลัยวัวชน
overview: She is obsessed with love and dreams while thinking that the lives of two people and friends are not different from other people. Every house has love, there is mourning, sweetness and bitterness every day. The Real Life of Oppa and the Music "Cowboy College" is not just a movie for the South. It is also the movie of the people of the country as well.
